mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_BOARD (TITLE, CONTENTS, REG_ID, REG_DATE, COMMUNITY_ID, HIDDEN_INFO, HIT_COUNT, IS_NOTICE) VALUES ( #{title}, #{contents}, #{regId},
#{regDate} CURRENT_DATE , #{communityId}, #{hiddenInfo},
#{hitCount} 0 ,
#{isNotice} FALSE
)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, COMMUNITY_ID = #{communityId}, HIDDEN_INFO = #{hiddenInfo}, HIT_COUNT = #{hitCount}, IS_NOTICE = #{isNotice} WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
